name: Winona Peach Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. For the Crust: Combine salt and flour. Cut in shortening until crumbly. Stir in vinegar and water until a firm dough forms. If needed, add more flour to achieve a firm consistency. Divide into two balls. Roll out one ball and fit it into an 8-inch pie plate.
2. For the Filling: In a bowl, combine peaches with sugar, flour, nutmeg, cinnamon, and salt. Mix well and pour over the crust.
3. Roll out the remaining dough and place it over the filling. Seal the edges and pierce the center of the top crust with a sharp knife.
4. Bake at 400°F for 35-40 minutes.
Recipe to rewrite:
Title: Winona Peach Pie
1. Combine salt and flour for the crust. Cut in shortening until crumbly. Stir in vinegar and water until a firm dough forms. If needed, add more flour to achieve a firm consistency. Divide into two balls.
2. Roll out one ball of dough and place it in an 8-inch pie plate.
3. In a separate bowl, mix peaches with sugar, flour, nutmeg, cinnamon, and salt. Pour the mixture over the crust.
4. Roll out the remaining dough and cover the filling. Seal the edges and pierce the center of the top crust with a sharp knife.
5. Bake at 400°F for 35-40 minutes.
